data.description: UKMTO REPORTED THAT THE CAPTAIN OF A BULK CARRIER SAID HE WAS APPROACHED BY A SMALL BOAT WITH A BLACK HULL AND SEVEN ARMED INDIVIDUALS.

data.title: Owens Corning Completes Sale of Glass Reinforcements Business to Praana Group
data.description: In Toledo, Ohio, Owens Corning (NYSE: OC) has finalized the sale of its glass reinforcements division to Praana Group. This move solidifies Owens Corning's position as a primarily building products-focused company in North America and Europe, improving its capital efficiency. The deal, initially revealed on April 15, 2026, has an enterprise value of $645 million. Notably, the agreement includes higher upfront cash earnings, which expedite the cash realization for Owens Corning.

data.title: Natural Grocers® Offers Mile High Giveaway at Select Colorado Front Range Stores, May 1-July 2, 2026
data.description: Natural Grocers®, a Colorado-based company, is providing {N}power® members with the opportunity to win $1,000 of free groceries weekly at over 30 locations in Colorado. This initiative aims to reward customers while promoting the brand's commitment to natural and organic products. Participants can enter for a chance to win at select stores.

data.title: Power Life High Impact Protein is a Must-Have for National Physical Fitness and Sports Month
data.description: A new protein formula, Power Life® High Impact Protein™, has been introduced to support performance, strength, and active lifestyles as part of National Physical Fitness and Sports Month. This all-in-one formula aims to help individuals prioritize strength, movement, and wellness. The product is set to launch in Los Angeles on May 1, 2026, targeting those looking to enhance their fitness regime.

data.title: Axsome Therapeutics Hosts AUVELITY® FDA Approval Investor Event Featuring Expert Thought Leader
data.description: Today at 8:00 AM Eastern Time, Axsome Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: AXSM) will hold a virtual investor event and conference call to address the recent approval by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) of AUVELITY ® for the treatment of agitation linked to Alzheimer’s disease. AUVELITY, a novel treatment targeting the N-methyl D-aspartate (NMDA) and sigma-1 receptors, combines dextromethorphan HBr and bupropion HCl. This marks a significant milestone as AUVELITY is the first treatment of its kind for Alzheimer’s disease agitation.

data.title: San Francisco’s Luxury Home Sales Jump 22% As Median Price Nears $7M
data.description: In Seattle, the sales of luxury homes in San Francisco soared by 22.2% year over year in March, marking the fifth consecutive month of double-digit growth. This increase ranks as the third-largest among the 50 most populous cities in the U.S. In contrast, non-luxury homes experienced a more modest 3.8% rise during the same period. According to a recent report from Redfin, a real estate brokerage supported by Rocket, the escalating demand for high-end properties in San Francisco has propelled the median luxury sale price to a staggering $6,808,561.

data.title: Donaldson Company to Present at the Oppenheimer 21st Annual Industrial Growth Conference
data.description: Minneapolis-based company Donaldson Company, Inc. (NYSE: DCI), renowned for its filtration products, shared news today that Brad Pogalz, their CFO, is scheduled to present at the Oppenheimer 21st Annual Industrial Growth Conference on May 4, 2026. The presentation will be virtual and commence at 11:15 a.m. ET. For those interested, a live webcast of the event can be accessed by visiting the “Events & Presentations” section of Donaldson’s Investor Relations website at IR.Donaldson.co.

data.title: Fulgent Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Fulgent Genetics, Inc., a tech company with laboratory and therapeutic development businesses, revealed its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. The results include a revenue of $71.1 million. The company reported a GAAP loss of $24.8 million ($0.80 per share), a non-GAAP loss of $11.0 million ($0.36 per share), and an adjusted EBITDA loss of $15.2 million during this period.

data.title: Nebius Agrees to Acquire Eigen AI, Strengthening Nebius Token Factory as a Frontier Inference Platform
data.description: In Amsterdam, Nebius (NASDAQ: NBIS), an AI cloud company, has revealed a deal to purchase Eigen AI, a prominent inference and model optimization firm. This acquisition aims to enhance Nebius Token Factory as a cutting-edge managed inference platform for AI production. By integrating Eigen AI's proven optimization stack with Nebius's expansive global compute capacity and AI cloud platform, this move will bolster their offering. Furthermore, Nebius will also gain expertise from elite research talent in inference, strengthening its existing in-house AI R&D capabilities.

data.title: Riverwood Capital Appoints Managing Director
data.description: A prominent investment firm, Riverwood Capital, specializing in Proven Growth technology, has recently named Mac Hofeditz as its new Managing Director (MD). This announcement was made in Menlo Park, California, and Miami.

data.title: Nexstar Media Group Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend of $1.86 Per Share
data.description: Nexstar Media Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: NXST) based in Irving, Texas, has reported that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $1.86 per share for its common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on May 29, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. Although the Company plans to continue these regular quarterly dividends going forward, decisions regarding future dividends will be evaluated each quarter and determined at the discretion of the Board of Directors.
Earnings Scheduled For May 1, 2026

data.title: Rockwell Automation Partnering with Feeding America Eastern Wisconsin and Fork Farms to Create Clock Tower Farms
data.description: A company specializing in industrial automation and digital transformation, Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK), has revealed a new initiative in Milwaukee. In collaboration with Feeding America Eastern Wisconsin, the state's largest hunger relief organization, they have established Clock Tower Farms. This innovative project will utilize hydroponic farming technology from Fork Farms along with Rockwell's automation technology to produce fresh and nutritious food. The aim is to combat hunger in the community. Clock Tower Farms represents a significant step towards addressing food insecurity in the region.

data.title: AutoNation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: AutoNation, Inc. announced its first quarter 2026 revenue of $6.6 billion, reflecting a 2% decrease from the previous year. Earnings per share (EPS) for the quarter were $5.85, up from $4.45 in the same period last year, while Adjusted EPS stood at $4.69, compared to $4.68 a year ago. The company reported record gross profit in its Aftermarket segment for the quarter. Non-GAAP financial measure reconciliations can be found in the accompanying financial tables.

data.title: Colgate Announces 1st Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: New York-based Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) reported a notable 8.4% increase in net sales, accompanied by a 2.9% rise in organic sales for the first quarter of 2026. These figures include a slight 0.6% decline in sales attributed to lower private label pet food. Despite a 6% decrease in GAAP EPS to $0.80, the Base Business EPS saw a significant upsurge of 7% to $0.97. Both GAAP and Base Business Gross profit margin experienced a slight decline of 20 basis points, settling at 60.6%. The company also disclosed a substantial net cash flow of $747 million from operations within the same period. Colgate-Palmolive maintains its position as a market leader in the toothpaste sector.
